title: White Wedding
why_this_song: White Wedding by Billy Idol (1982) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 8 times; first heard in: "Hey little sister, what have you done?"
Appears 8 times; first heard in: "Hey little sister, what have you done?"
Appears 8 times; first heard in: "Oh, it's a nice day to start again"
Appears 7 times; first heard in: "Oh, it's a nice day to start again"
Appears 6 times; first heard in: "Come on, nice day for a white wedding day"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "little" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "little" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "sister" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "sister" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Hey little sister, what have you done?
Hey, little sister, what's your vice or wish?
There ain't nothin' safe in this world

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Hey little sister, who's the only one?
I look for something left in this world

exercises.prompt_en: "White Wedding" was released in 1982. Do you think the themes in the song are timeless, or do they feel dated? Give one example from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: "White Wedding" foi lançada em 1982. Você acha que os temas da música são atemporais ou já parecem datados? Dê um exemplo do que ouviu.

exercises.prompt_en: Imagine you are making a short film with "White Wedding" as the soundtrack. What scene would you show while the chorus plays?
exercises.prompt_pt: Imagine que você vai fazer um curta com "White Wedding" como trilha sonora. Que cena você mostraria no momento do refrão?

exercises.prompt_en: The singer makes a claim or statement in this song. Do you agree with it? Use evidence from the lyrics to support your answer.
exercises.prompt_pt: O cantor faz uma afirmação nessa música. Você concorda? Use pelo menos um verso para defender sua resposta.

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
